---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Roadmap Phase

Which phase does this relate to? (See [PORTAL_ROADMAP.md](../../docs/PORTAL_ROADMAP.md))

- [ ] Phase 1 — Proposal content in portal
- [ ] Phase 2 — Meeting actions & modifications
- [ ] Phase 3 — Post-meeting automation
- [ ] Not on roadmap (new idea)

## Problem

What workflow problem does this solve? How does it reduce manual work?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what the feature should do.

## Portal Affected

- [ ] Secretariat portal
- [ ] Chair portal
- [ ] Go Live mode
- [ ] Both portals

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, meeting transcript excerpts, or workflow descriptions.
